Allows nuclear medicine departments to keep track of radioactive inventory, radiopharmaceutical doses, patient dose records information and radiopharmaceutical billing.

The fully integrated Nuclear Medicine dose tracking software shall include:
Patient dose amounts, procedures, referring physicians and radioactive waste disposal
Automated daily reporting
Automated monthly record keeping

Access everything from one main screen
Have convenient shortcuts for day-to-day tasks
Ability to quickly view all patient information
View satellite department data
Produce daily and monthly inspection reports
Health physics services
Export reports to Excel
View a patient's scheduled exams and exam history
View a patient’s dose record from previous exams
Track shipping containers
Track records of sealed sources and radioactive waste disposal
Sort inventory
Barcoded inventory
1. Patient dose record keeping
2. Radiopharmaceutical inventory
3. QA & QM for all nuclear medicine hot lab equipment
4. Hot waste disposal
5. Daily and weekly survey and wipes record keeping
6. TRM approved
The salient characteristics listed above are essential to the Government’s requirements. To my knowledge, the restrictions listed above will not limit the acquisition to an item peculiar to one manufacture.
